aries.text: That restless feeling isn't going away until you actually do something about it. Channel today's energy into a project you've been postponing—your natural initiative is running high, and momentum builds faster than you expect. Mars is backing your boldest move, so stop second-guessing yourself.

taurus.text: You're craving stability, but the day keeps throwing little surprises your way. Instead of resisting, find one small pleasure to ground yourself—maybe that expensive coffee or the long walk through the park. Sometimes holding steady means adapting, not digging in.

gemini.text: Have you noticed how many conversations you're juggling right now? Mercury's influence sharpens your wit today, making you the person everyone wants to talk to. Just remember to actually listen instead of planning your next clever response—someone's dropping hints about something important.

cancer.text: Your intuition is practically screaming at you today, so trust those gut feelings about who means well and who doesn't. Take the afternoon to do something nurturing for yourself—not everyone else for once. The moon's position suggests emotional clarity is coming, but only if you create space for it.

leo.text: You're radiating confidence without even trying, and people are noticing. Use this natural magnetism to reconnect with someone who could open doors for you professionally. Don't dim your light to make others comfortable—spring is about growth, and you're in full bloom.

virgo.text: All those details you've been meticulously tracking? They're about to pay off. Someone at work will finally recognize the precision you bring to everything, though you might need to speak up rather than wait for acknowledgment. Take the rest of the evening off from analyzing—your brain deserves a break.

libra.text: Why are you still weighing options on something your heart already decided? Venus is nudging you toward pleasure and partnership today, so let yourself enjoy the moment instead of endlessly deliberating. Wear something that makes you feel beautiful—it shifts your whole energy.

scorpio.text: That secret you're keeping is taking up more mental space than it deserves. Consider whether holding onto it serves you or just feeds old patterns of control. Transformation happens when you're vulnerable enough to let something go, and today offers that opportunity if you're brave enough to take it.

sagittarius.text: Your wanderlust is kicking in hard, but if you can't physically travel today, let your mind roam instead. Pick up that philosophy book or call a friend who always challenges your perspective. Jupiter's expansive energy means even small explorations feel significant right now.

capricorn.text: You've been climbing steadily, but today asks you to pause and assess whether you're heading toward the right summit. Ambition without direction is just exhaustion. Take the longer route home and use that time to reflect on what success actually means to you right now, not what it meant five years ago.

aquarius.text: Your unconventional solution to yesterday's problem is looking smarter by the hour. Don't be surprised when others suddenly want to collaborate on your vision—Uranus loves rewarding innovation. Just make sure you're partnering with people who genuinely get it, not those who want to water it down.

pisces.text: The boundary between your dreams and reality feels especially thin today. Write down whatever images or ideas float through your consciousness—Neptune is downloading something important. Someone from your past might resurface in your thoughts; send them good energy but don't reach out just yet.

aries.overview: Your natural drive gets a softer edge this week, making collaboration feel less like compromise and more like strategy. That project you've been forcing? It wants to unfold at its own pace now.
aries.love: Vulnerability isn't weakness when you're with someone who matches your energy. Single Rams might find themselves drawn to someone who challenges rather than chases them.
aries.career: Leadership means knowing when to push and when to create space for others to step up. Your ideas land better when you let them breathe instead of defending them immediately.
aries.advice: Trust that pausing doesn't mean losing momentum. Sometimes the fastest way forward is a well-timed reset.

taurus.overview: Something you've been building quietly is ready to show itself, and the timing couldn't feel more right. You're learning that security doesn't always mean holding tight—sometimes it means knowing what to release.
taurus.love: Comfort zones feel especially appealing, but there's growth waiting just beyond them if you're willing to risk a little emotional honesty. Partnered Bulls benefit from saying the quiet part out loud.
taurus.career: Your practical skills shine when you stop second-guessing your instincts about what's sustainable and what's just shiny. Value your time as much as you value quality.
taurus.advice: Let yourself want something new without justifying why the old way isn't working anymore.

gemini.overview: Your mental energy scatters in productive directions this week, connecting dots others haven't noticed yet. What feels like distraction might actually be your brain gathering exactly what it needs.
gemini.love: Chemistry and compatibility aren't always the same thing—this week helps you distinguish between them. Conversations reveal more than grand gestures right now.
gemini.career: Multitasking is your superpower, but even you need to finish something before starting the next thing. One complete project outweighs three half-formed ideas when it comes to visibility.
gemini.advice: Write it down before you lose it. Your best insights this week arrive fast and leave faster if you don't capture them.

cancer.overview: The emotional work you've been doing privately starts to change how you move through the world. You're realizing that protecting your peace doesn't mean building higher walls—it means better boundaries.
cancer.love: Your intuition about someone's intentions is probably correct, even if you can't articulate why yet. Trust the feeling before you trust the explanation.
cancer.career: Your nurturing approach to teamwork gets recognized, possibly in ways that surprise you. Someone's been noticing how you hold things together without needing credit for it.
cancer.advice: Stop waiting for the perfect emotional moment to make a practical decision. Your feelings and your logic can work together here.

leo.overview: Creative blocks dissolve when you stop performing and start playing. This week rewards experimentation over perfection, reminding you why you fell in love with your passions in the first place.
leo.love: Being seen is different from being known, and you're craving the latter more than usual. Let someone past the highlight reel this week—the vulnerability pays off.
leo.career: Your charisma opens doors, but your follow-through is what keeps them open. Make sure the substance matches the presentation, especially mid-week.
leo.advice: You don't need everyone's approval, just the right people's respect. Choose your audience wisely.

virgo.overview: Perfectionism loosens its grip just enough for you to see what's already working beautifully. The flaws you've been obsessing over? Most people haven't even noticed them.
virgo.love: Analyzing someone's feelings won't give you certainty, but asking them directly might. Your need for clarity is valid—just make sure you're seeking it from the source, not from patterns.
virgo.career: Your attention to detail remains your strength, but this week asks you to zoom out occasionally and appreciate the whole picture. Delegation isn't lowering standards; it's leveraging different strengths.
virgo.advice: Done is better than perfect, especially for something no one but you will scrutinize. Give yourself permission to move on.

libra.overview: Relationships take center stage, but not in the way you expect—this week is about recalibrating your own needs within them. You've been accommodating yourself out of balance.
libra.love: Harmony doesn't mean never rocking the boat; it means both people feeling safe enough to be honest. That difficult conversation you're avoiding might actually bring you closer.
libra.career: Your diplomatic skills are an asset, but make sure you're not smoothing over problems that actually need addressing. Sometimes tension indicates something worth fighting for.
libra.advice: Practice saying what you want before softening it with what you think others want to hear. Your preferences matter just as much.

scorpio.overview: Intensity runs high, but you're learning to channel it rather than suppress it or unleash it indiscriminately. Power comes from precision this week, not from overwhelming force.
scorpio.love: Trust issues surface not as problems but as information about what you need to feel safe. Share the deeper truth, not just the surface version you think people can handle.
scorpio.career: Your research and insight give you an edge, especially if you're willing to share what you've discovered instead of hoarding it as leverage. Collaboration multiplies your impact right now.
scorpio.advice: Not everything is a test, and not everyone is hiding something. Sometimes people are exactly who they appear to be.

sagittarius.overview: Your restlessness points toward genuine growth opportunities rather than simple boredom. Pay attention to what you're curious about—it's leading somewhere worthwhile.
sagittarius.love: Freedom and commitment aren't opposites when you're with someone who expands rather than restricts your world. Look for partnership that adds adventure, not subtracts it.
sagittarius.career: Your big-picture thinking impresses people, but landing the details matters this week. Bridge the gap between vision and execution, even if it feels tedious.
sagittarius.advice: Finish what you started before chasing the next horizon. One completed journey teaches you more than three abandoned ones.

capricorn.overview: Responsibility feels lighter when you remember why you chose it in the first place. This week brings renewed purpose to commitments that were starting to feel like obligations.
capricorn.love: Emotional walls that once protected you might now be isolating you. Consider letting someone help carry what you've been shouldering alone—it's strength, not weakness.
capricorn.career: Your hard work is positioning you for something bigger, though the recognition might come later than the effort. Keep building; the foundation you're laying now matters more than immediate applause.
capricorn.advice: Ambition and rest aren't enemies. Your productivity actually increases when you stop treating breaks as failures.

aquarius.overview: Your unconventional approach suddenly makes sense to people who didn't get it before. What felt like swimming upstream now feels like you were simply ahead of the current.
aquarius.love: Intellectual connection matters to you, but don't underestimate the power of simple presence. Sometimes the most revolutionary thing you can do is just show up consistently.
aquarius.career: Innovation is your gift, but implementation requires playing well with existing systems at least temporarily. Find the balance between disruption and cooperation this week.
aquarius.advice: Community doesn't mean conformity. You can belong without losing what makes you different.

pisces.overview: Dreams and reality find common ground this week, revealing that your visions aren't as impractical as others have suggested. Your imagination has been showing you the way forward all along.
pisces.love: Compassion is beautiful, but make sure you're not absorbing someone else's emotional weather as your own. You can support without merging completely.
pisces.career: Your creative solutions impress people, especially when you can articulate them clearly rather than just feeling them intuitively. Translate your hunches into language others can work with.
pisces.advice: Boundaries aren't barriers—they're the container that lets your gifts flow in sustainable directions. Protect your energy this week.

aries.overview: May asks you to slow down just enough to notice what's actually working in your life. The pace you've been keeping has brought results, but this month rewards strategic pauses over constant motion. You'll find that power comes from refining your approach rather than starting from scratch. Spring's renewal energy is asking you to cultivate what you've already planted.
aries.love: Conversations deepen in unexpected ways, especially around the middle of the month when vulnerability feels less like a risk and more like a gift you're ready to give.
aries.career: Your ideas have momentum, but implementation requires patience you don't naturally possess. The wins come from follow-through, not just the initial spark.
aries.health: Your nervous system needs more downtime than your ego wants to admit. Build in rest before your body demands it.
aries.advice: Not every hill requires a charge. Sometimes the view improves when you stop climbing long enough to look around.

taurus.overview: How do you honor yourself when everything around you seems to demand constant flexibility? This is your season, but the usual indulgence gives way to something more complex this year. You're being asked to redefine what security actually means, and the answers might surprise you. May brings opportunities to build stability in unconventional ways.
taurus.love: Someone's inconsistency isn't charming anymore, and you're finally ready to acknowledge it. Clarity about what you deserve shifts the entire dynamic.
taurus.career: Financial decisions require more research than usual, but your instincts about value are particularly sharp right now. Trust what feels sustainable over what merely looks impressive.
taurus.health: Your body craves routine, but make sure that routine includes pleasure, not just productivity.
taurus.advice: The ground beneath you is more solid than it feels. What looks like uncertainty might actually be the foundation for something better.

gemini.overview: The month before your season always feels like standing at the edge of something, and this May is no exception. You're sorting through information, ideas, and connections, deciding what gets to come with you into your next chapter. Mental clarity arrives in waves rather than all at once. Give yourself permission to think out loud without committing to every thought that crosses your mind.
gemini.love: You're ready for conversations that go beyond surface charm, even if that means temporary discomfort. Depth doesn't have to mean heaviness.
gemini.career: A project you'd written off may resurface with new life, requiring you to reconsider your dismissal. Your versatility is an asset, not a flaw.
gemini.health: Restlessness is information, not a problem to solve. Notice what your distractions are protecting you from feeling.
gemini.advice: Not everything needs to be figured out by the end of the month. Some questions are worth living with for a while.

cancer.overview: May pulls you inward when the world expects you to show up fully formed and ready. There's important work happening beneath the surface, the kind that doesn't make for good conversation at parties but fundamentally shifts how you move through the world. This is a month for listening to your inner voice, even when it whispers instead of shouts. Trust that retreat is not the same as withdrawal.
cancer.love: Old patterns show up wearing new faces, giving you another chance to choose differently. Recognition is half the battle.
cancer.career: Behind-the-scenes work pays off more than visible performance right now. Your influence is growing even when you can't see evidence of it.
cancer.health: Sleep is not optional, and your dreams are trying to tell you something. Pay attention to what surfaces when you're finally still.
cancer.advice: You don't owe anyone access to your process. Let yourself be unfinished in private.

leo.overview: Your social world expands in May, bringing connections that feel both exciting and slightly overwhelming. Someone sees your potential before you've fully claimed it yourself, and their recognition asks you to rise to an occasion you didn't know was coming. Community matters more than spotlight this month. The growth happens in collaboration, not solo performance.
leo.love: Friendship and romance blur in interesting ways, forcing you to get honest about what you actually want versus what looks good from the outside.
leo.career: A group project brings out your leadership abilities without the usual pressure to carry everything alone. Delegation is a skill worth developing.
leo.health: Your heart, both literally and metaphorically, needs attention. Check in with what brings you genuine joy versus what you do for applause.
leo.advice: Being seen is wonderful, but being understood is better. Seek the latter first.

virgo.overview: Have you been waiting for permission to want what you want? May puts your ambitions in the spotlight, whether you feel ready or not. Professional opportunities arrive with a strange mix of excitement and imposter syndrome, but that tension is actually confirmation that you're growing. Your standards serve you, but perfectionism is starting to cost more than it's worth. This is a month to let your work speak for itself.
virgo.love: You're tired of fixing things, and that exhaustion is actually healthy. Let relationships be easy for once, or let them go.
virgo.career: Recognition comes from unexpected quarters, validating work you almost didn't think counted. Your attention to detail sets you apart without you having to explain it.
virgo.health: Your digestive system reflects your stress levels more directly than you'd like to admit. What you're processing emotionally shows up physically.
virgo.advice: Done is better than perfect, and you already know this. Now practice believing it.

libra.overview: May stretches your perspective, asking you to consider possibilities you'd previously dismissed as impractical or too far removed from what you know. There's a restlessness building that has nothing to do with dissatisfaction and everything to do with readiness for expansion. Learning takes center stage, whether through formal study, travel, or conversations with people who think nothing like you. Balance comes from exploration, not from staying safely in the middle.
libra.love: Someone's philosophy about relationships either aligns with yours or reveals a gap you can't bridge with charm alone. Pay attention to values, not just attraction.
libra.career: An opportunity to teach, publish, or share your expertise arrives faster than expected. Say yes before you feel completely ready.
libra.health: Your hips and lower back hold tension you're not consciously aware of carrying. Movement helps, but so does asking what you're bracing for.
libra.advice: Not every decision requires consensus. Some paths are yours alone to walk, and that's not selfishness—it's growth.

scorpio.overview: Transformation is your territory, but this May asks you to let someone else participate in the process. Shared resources, shared vulnerability, shared power—these themes won't let you stay comfortably in control. Something ends this month, and you're more ready than you think. What looks like loss from one angle looks like liberation from another, and you've always been good at holding contradictions.
scorpio.love: Intimacy deepens when you stop testing people to see if they'll stay. The ones who matter don't need to be proven.
scorpio.career: A financial or creative partnership requires renegotiation, but the conversation strengthens the foundation rather than threatening it. Advocate for yourself clearly.
scorpio.health: Old grief lives in your body, and May brings opportunities for release you didn't ask for but probably need. Let yourself feel without trying to understand it all immediately.
scorpio.advice: Control is overrated. See what happens when you trust the process without managing every variable.

sagittarius.overview: Relationships take up more space in your life than usual, and for once that doesn't feel like a cage. May highlights partnerships of all kinds, asking you to show up with consistency that might feel unnatural at first. Someone's needs aren't a threat to your freedom—they're an invitation to discover what commitment looks like when you actually choose it. The adventure you're seeking might be in staying, not leaving.
sagittarius.love: A conversation you've been avoiding gets easier when you finally have it. Honesty clears the air faster than you expected.
sagittarius.career: Collaboration brings better results than solo efforts, even though you prefer working independently. The right partner challenges you without diminishing you.
sagittarius.health: Your restlessness isn't always a sign to move—sometimes it's a sign that you're avoiding something that requires stillness to process.
sagittarius.advice: Freedom and commitment aren't opposites. You can have both if you stop framing them as a choice.

capricorn.overview: The details of daily life demand more attention in May, and you're surprisingly okay with it. There's satisfaction in refining your routines, in making the ordinary run smoothly, in solving small problems before they become large ones. Your body and your work both benefit from systems that actually serve you rather than just looking impressive on paper. Efficiency matters, but so does sustainability.
capricorn.love: Love shows up in the everyday gestures, not grand declarations. Notice who makes your life easier just by being in it.
capricorn.career: Your work ethic has never been the question—it's whether you're applying it to the right things. A schedule overhaul brings surprising relief.
capricorn.health: You've been ignoring minor symptoms that are trying to tell you something before it becomes major. Listen to the whispers so you don't have to hear the shouts.
capricorn.advice: Not everything worth doing requires suffering through it. Let some things be easy.

aquarius.overview: When was the last time you let yourself play without purpose? May insists on joy, creativity, and risk-taking that has nothing to do with productivity. Your ideas are brilliant, but they need the fuel that only pleasure can provide. Romance, art, and self-expression pull you out of your head and into your heart. The innovation you're known for requires you to be a full human, not just a brain on legs.
aquarius.love: You're more romantic than you let on, and this month makes hiding it nearly impossible. Vulnerability feels less dangerous than usual.
aquarius.career: A creative project brings unexpected professional traction, proving that passion and profit don't have to be separate. Follow what excites you.
aquarius.health: Your heart—physically and emotionally—is asking for more play, more laughter, more things that make you feel alive. Take it seriously by not taking everything seriously.
aquarius.advice: Being different is easy for you. Being open is harder, and that's exactly what's being asked of you now.

pisces.overview: Home and family pull your attention inward, asking you to address foundations you've been meaning to strengthen for months. May brings both the time and the motivation to deal with what you've been floating above. Emotional security requires more than just good intentions—it needs concrete action, boundaries, and sometimes difficult conversations with the people closest to you. The sanctuary you're building starts with being honest about what actually feels safe.
pisces.love: You can't pour from an empty cup, and your relationships improve when you stop trying. Fill yourself up first; the right people will understand.
pisces.career: Working from home or finding ways to make your professional life feel more personal brings better results than forcing yourself into environments that drain you.
pisces.health: Your feet, your foundation, your literal and metaphorical roots need attention. Ground yourself before you float away completely.
pisces.advice: Boundaries aren't walls—they're the structure that lets you actually connect without losing yourself. Build them with care.
